name: Visual Translate by Vozo
tagline: Localize video text overlays into any language without rebuilding your visuals from scratch.
problem: Businesses expanding into new markets face the costly, time-consuming task of recreating video assets whenever on-screen text needs translating. Replacing text within existing video frames typically requires design resources and re-editing. Visual Translate automates this by detecting and replacing in-video text while preserving the original visual style and layout.
useCases: Localizing product demo videos for international markets
Translating subtitle and title cards in marketing campaigns
Adapting e-learning course videos for multilingual audiences
Updating social media video content for regional distribution
